About.leadCopy:
See it! Touch it! Feel it! The world's first VTuber-dedicated expo has finally landed in Akihabara!
Live shows, talk events, exhibitions, merch — two full days of nothing but VTuber!
An excitement you won't find anywhere else is waiting for you!
About.card1Desc: A large-scale exhibition dedicated entirely to VTubers — and it's a world first! Live stages, talk shows, corporate exhibits, merch, food courts — a dream space packed with everything VTuber, appearing in Akihabara for two days only!
About.card2Title:
30+ VTuber Agencies
All in One Place!
About.card2Desc: Hololive, Nijisanji, VSPO! and so many more — over 30 VTuber agencies from Japan and around the world, all united under one roof! Meet your favorites and discover amazing new talent! No other event brings this many agencies together!
About.card3Desc: Special live performances, exclusive talk events, collab food, limited-edition merch you can only get here! The energy that only comes from being there in person! Your favorite VTubers, right before your eyes — and admission is totally free!

Lineup.sectionTitle: The Biggest Ever! 30+ VTuber Agencies Unite!

Social.subtitle: FOLLOW US
Social.title: Stay in the Loop!
Social.description: Follow our official X and YouTube channels for the latest performer announcements and event news!
